RAISE_SKELETON.name: Raise Skeleton
RAISE_SKELETON.description: Consume a corpse to summon a skeleton warrior.

RECALL_SKELETON.name: Recall Skeleton
RECALL_SKELETON.description: Revert a skeleton warrior back into mana.

FOCUS_FIRE.name: Mark of Death
FOCUS_FIRE.description: Minions prioritize attacking the marked target.

CORPSE_EXPLOSION.name: Corpse Explosion
CORPSE_EXPLOSION.description: Detonate a corpse to deal area-of-effect damage.

SOUL_HARVEST.name: Soul Harvest
SOUL_HARVEST.description: Extract essence from a corpse to restore mana.

SOUL_TRANSFER.name: Soul Transfer
SOUL_TRANSFER.description: Transfers the necromancer's health to a minion.

BONE_PRISON.name: Bone Prison
BONE_PRISON.description: Restricts target movement using bone structures.

BONE_STORM.name: Bone Storm
BONE_STORM.description: Sacrifice all skeletons to deal massive AOE damage proportional to their total HP.
